chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2437 of 2019 Kamran Ali Memon Versus Project Director EPI Sindh Karachi & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 10868/19 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 06.05.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old petition of 2019 which is over six years old. It was last taken up on 17.03.2020, which is over five years ago. In the last five years learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today despite lapse of five years none is present for the petitioner without intimation as such it appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
